overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dystopian urban wasteland during golden hour. The journey progresses from ruined buildings past a white house and neon-lit tower, following an NPC across a street, and finally under an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined building complex with debris and sandbag barricades

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rubble-strewn ruins toward a distant suspension bridge

entered.detail: partially collapsed concrete structure with broken walls and exposed rebar
tall bridge towers visible in the distance against the golden hour sky
derelict dark-colored vehicle with open doors and missing wheels
piles of white sandbags blocking part of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a post-apocalyptic ruin with collapsed concrete structures and abandoned vehicles. The player moves through a narrow dirt path lined with sandbags, heading toward distant bridge towers visible against a clear golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential alley with abandoned vehicles transitioning to commercial view

events.description: exiting dense ruins into more open residential area with intact white house and distant neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking past a white two-story house while approaching a neon-lit commercial tower in the distance

entered.detail: intact white residential building with multiple windows and a gabled roof
tall commercial building with illuminated red and blue 24/7 signage
rusted red sedan parked along the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from ruins to a residential alley where a white house stands intact among the decay. The iconic neon 24/7 tower becomes visible in the distance as the player passes a red abandoned car and approaches an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between buildings leading to major street intersection

events.description: beginning to follow an NPC character in orange clothing walking ahead

agents.ego_description: following a character dressed in orange and yellow clothing through an alleyway toward the street

notable_agents.action: NPC in orange outfit walking ahead of the player toward the street intersection

entered.detail: low yellow building with graffiti on the exterior walls
massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning across the view

segments.scene_description: The player follows an NPC in orange clothing through a narrow alley flanked by a yellow industrial building. The elevated highway structure looms ahead as the path narrows, with the neon tower growing larger on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic and crosswalks

events.description: emerging from dirt alley onto paved asphalt street intersection
green vintage car drives past from left to right across the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street while observing passing traffic and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: green vintage sedan with white roof driving through the intersection
person in red jacket and yellow pants crossing the street

entered.detail: paved road with crosswalk markings and red painted curbs
standard traffic signal mounted on a pole at the intersection
tall electrical pylon with multiple power lines silhouetted against the sun

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a paved intersection bathed in golden hour light, crossing the street as a green vintage car passes by. Power lines and transmission towers frame the left side while the elevated highway structure dominates the center view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial corridor beneath elevated highway

events.description: entering the shadowed area beneath the elevated highway structure with concrete pillars

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway through a narrow corridor lined with abandoned stalls

entered.detail: massive weathered concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure
blue and white automated vending machine with illuminated display
tall palm tree growing beneath the overpass casting long shadows

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the shadowed corridor beneath the elevated highway, where massive concrete pillars line the path. A vending machine stands on the right among abandoned commercial stalls, while the highway deck blocks most of the sky overhead, creating a sheltered urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian wasteland that transitions from open ruins into a shadowed urban canyon. It begins amidst collapsed concrete structures and abandoned vehicles, moving along a narrow dirt path toward distant bridge towers under a clear golden hour sky. As the camera advances, the ruins give way to a residential alley featuring a solitary white house and a red abandoned car, while a neon 24/7 tower emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts into a narrow passage flanked by a yellow industrial building as the player follows an NPC in orange clothing, eventually emerging onto a sun-drenched paved intersection where a green vintage car passes by. Finally, the camera moves from the bright open street into the deep shadows beneath an elevated highway, passing massive concrete pillars and a vending machine as the highway deck closes off the sky.
